<!--
Thanks for opening a PR. The sections below get filled in by you and
read by whoever reviews. None are strictly required, but skipping the
Test plan or Screenshots sections on changes that need them will
slow the review down.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph. What does this change, and why. -->

## Test plan

<!--
Bulleted checklist of what you did to verify this works. For backend
changes: which tests pass, which were added, what manual smoke testing
was done. For UI changes: which surfaces you exercised in a real build.

  - [ ] `dotnet test` passes
  - [ ] Tested on Windows (variant: …)
  - [ ] Tested on Linux (variant: …)
  - [ ] Manually verified <specific flow>
-->

## Screenshots / video

<!-- Only for visible changes. Before / after side-by-side if you can. -->

## Breaking change?

<!--
Yes / no. If yes:
- What breaks?
- For whom (catalog format, public API, UI behavior)?
- Migration path or guard?
-->

## Linked issues

<!--
Closes #123
Related to #456
-->
